impact: The supervisor now records the failed self-heal diagnostics, validates the daemon without accepting the invalid patch, parks repeated syntax-loop tasks when needed, and can restart the worker on the explicit llm_router path instead of waiting for manual intervention.
summary: Apply built-in supervisor fallback after failed agentic repair.
target_task: Built-in supervisor fallback: 4 recent durable LLM parse/runtime diagnostics were recorded for the same task before the daemon exited; park the looping task and restart on the next independent task without invoking the LLM repair path

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
